task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock main application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the import functionality in JStock
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu item for importing a watchlist is clicked, or a file chooser dialog for importing is open.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'healthcare_stocks.csv' located in the Documents folder is selected in the file chooser dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the imported stocks are displayed in the watchlist
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock watchlist grid displays all 8 required stock symbols: JNJ, PFE, UNH, ABT, TMO, ABBV, MRK, and LLY.
The final screenshots show the desktop environment with the JStock application window closed.

integrity.description: Agent used the JStock GUI to import the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with JStock menus and dialogs, not terminal commands copying files into the watchlist directory.
The stocks are viewed inside the JStock application interface, not in a text editor or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: Agent imported the file rather than manually adding stocks
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the import file dialog rather than manually typing each stock symbol into the JStock search/add bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file to import is located at '/home/ga/Documents/healthcare_stocks.csv'. The target stocks that must be visible in the JStock watchlist are JNJ, PFE, UNH, ABT, TMO, ABBV, MRK, and LLY.
